segments.name: The 3:00 AM Notification
segments.script: Imagine looking at your phone right now. It’s a number you don’t recognize, but the message is for you. Behind that notification is a mathematical ghost born in 1865.
segments.prompt_a: SMI-Veritasium Style. 35mm Prime Lens, f/1.8. Macro close-up of a smartphone on a nightstand. Cinestill 800T lighting with cinematic blue halation. Screen is pitch black. Moody dark room. 4K.
segments.prompt_b: Anamorphic horizontal blue lens flare as the notification icon appears. Glowing neon-blue 'Kinetic Ripples' pulse through the volumetric dust in the air.
segments.animation_desc: Cinematic slow-motion pulse. The invisible radio waves ripple out with shimmering neon-blue plasma energy. Volumetric lighting and lens flares.

segments.name: The Hertz Resonance
segments.script: Wait... did you see that? That tiny spark is the proof that Hertz’s experiment proved Maxwell was right.
segments.prompt_a: SMI-Veritasium Style. Macro photography of micro-scratched brushed brass spheres. Orthographic side-view. Dark-grid background. Cinematic soft-box lighting.
segments.prompt_b: Identical frame. Jagged cobalt-blue plasma spark with horizontal blue lens flares. Concentric gold ripples representing the electromagnetic field.
segments.animation_desc: Extreme slow-motion. The golden waves hit the wire, causing the spark to fire with massive energy halation and plasma detail.
